bannerTickerText: 🕉️ Experience the Divine Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra 2026 - Bookings Open!
📞 Contact our High Altitude Specialists at +91 9101211949 or +91 9631651910
💼 Registered with Uttarakhand Tourism Board (Reg ID: NT-2026)
✈️ Mount Kailash Aerial Darshan Flight (Lucknow Base) - No Chinese Visa/Passport Required!
🏔️ Outer Line Permits & medical forms handled seamlessly by Adi Kailash Tirath team.

heroSlides.title: Travel Where Spirit Meets The Himalaya
heroSlides.subtitle: Kailash Mansarovar Yatra
heroSlides.desc: Adi Kailash Tirath curates spiritually meaningful journeys with clear planning, trusted stays, permit guidance, and dedicated mountain-ground support from departure to return.

heroSlides.title: Experience the Divine Mystery of Snow Symbolism
heroSlides.subtitle: Adi Kailash & Om Parvat
heroSlides.desc: Watch the holy self-formed divine Om symbol appear naturally in pristine white snow. Explore Parvati Kund, Gauri Kund, and the source of Vyas valley spirituality accompanied by seasoned native sherpas.

heroSlides.title: The Ultimate Four Abodes of the Deities
heroSlides.subtitle: Classics of Chardham
heroSlides.desc: An all-inclusive, divine expedition covering Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath. Relax in pre-vetted warm riverside cottages with healthy pure organic vegetarian cuisine.

circularDestinations.title: Adi Kailash Parvat
circularDestinations.description: Sacred trek to Adi Kailash, Gauri Kund, Parvati Kund and Om Parvat.

circularDestinations.title: Complete Chardham
circularDestinations.description: Divine yatra of Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath shrines.

circularDestinations.title: Babaji Cave Dunagiri
circularDestinations.description: Spiritual meditation at Mahavatar Babaji's Cave in Ranikhet hills.

circularDestinations.title: Amarnath Helicopter
circularDestinations.description: Hassle-free 1-day helicopter transfers from Baltal to pure icy Cave shrines.

circularDestinations.title: Amarnath & Vaishno Devi
circularDestinations.description: Divine combination yatra crossing Katra Bhavan & Srinagar heli routes.

circularDestinations.title: Amarnath Tours
circularDestinations.description: Rigorous classic trekking groups via Pahalgam under certified medical guidelines.

circularDestinations.title: Om Parvat Frontier
circularDestinations.description: Witness the natural sacred snow symbols forming eternal Om patterns.

circularDestinations.title: Munsyari Hills
circularDestinations.description: Amazing hill vistas, snow peaks, and Birthi waterfalls walks.

circularDestinations.title: Kainchi Dham Ashram
circularDestinations.description: Peaceful ashram valleys of Baba Neem Karoli near the Kumaon lakes.

circularDestinations.title: Maa Purnagiri Shrine
circularDestinations.description: Revered mountain top Shaktipith overlooking the gushing Sharda River.

circularDestinations.title: Panchachuli Ranges
circularDestinations.description: Expeditions near the base camp of the magnificent five snow pinnacles.

circularDestinations.title: Darma Valley
circularDestinations.description: Hidden glacial frontier valleys on the Indo-Tibetan trade rim.

circularDestinations.title: Chirkilla Reservoir
circularDestinations.description: Scenic dam lake on Kali river valley with boating and eco tours.

circularDestinations.title: Narayan Ashram Retreat
circularDestinations.description: Vedic meditation and peace library at 9000 feet near Tawaghat borders.

packages.title: Adi Kailash, Om Parvat & Mahavatar Babaji Cave Private Tour
packages.overview: A deeply spiritual yatra to Adi Kailash and Om Parvat, including the holy darsans of Parvati Kund, Gauri Kund, Gunji, and Pandav Fort. Accompanied by experienced mountain guides and comfortable ground transport.
highlights: Darshan of the sacred self-formed Om symbol on Om Parvat
Holy dip in the pristine waters of Parvati Kund & Gauri Kund
Private excursion to Mahavatar Babaji's Cave in Dunagiri
Stay in clean, premium homestays & local mountain resorts
All Inner Line Permits & border registration cleared by us
inclusion: Accommodation in deluxe stays & high-altitude clean homestays
All pure vegetarian meals (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)
4x4 SUV (Bolero/Camper) for rugged terrain transit
Govt Inner Line Permit, processing fees, and environmental charges
Oxygen cylinder support inside vehicles & highly trained tour managers
exclusion: Tips, laundry, or personal phone bill expenses

itinerary.title: Haldwani to Kathgodam and scenic drive to Pithoragarh
itinerary.details: Assemble at Kathgodam railway station. Embark on a breathtaking mountain drive to Pithoragarh. Check-in at the hotel, attend a detailed yatra briefing, and receive your high-altitude medical fitness checks.

itinerary.title: Pithoragarh to Dharchula - Document Verification
itinerary.details: Drive alongside the roaring Kali River to Dharchula. The afternoon is dedicated to biometric physical biometric clearances and verification with administrative officials.

itinerary.title: Dharchula to Gunji/Nabi - The High Himalayan Rim
itinerary.details: Board our specially prepped high-clearance 4x4 vehicles. Traverse stunning waterfalls and border outposts to arrive in Gunji (10,500 ft). Welcome ceremony by locals.

itinerary.title: Sacred Om Parvat Darshan - Nabhidhang Excursion
itinerary.details: Early morning drive to Nabhidhang. Stand in awe of Om Parvat, where snow naturally outlines the sacred 'Om' symbol. Perform peaceful prayers and return to Nabi village.

itinerary.title: Adi Kailash Summit - Parvati Kund & Gauri Kund
itinerary.details: Reach the base of Adi Kailash. Visit Jotling (Lord Shiva temple) and Gauri Kund. Perform sacred rituals. Trek to the pristine, reflective waters of Parvati Kund.

itinerary.title: Gunji to Dharchula - Journey Downwards
itinerary.details: Bid farewell to Vyas Valley. Return to Dharchula. Celebrate successful high-altitude completion with a cozy cultural dinner.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Mahavatar Babaji Cave in Dunagiri
itinerary.details: Drive towards Ranikhet/Dunagiri hills. Hike to Mahavatar Babaji's historic cave—the source of Kriya Yoga. Meditate in the legendary silence.

itinerary.title: Return Drive to Kathgodam for Departure
itinerary.details: Morning meditation, followed by departure drive back to Kathgodam station to wrap up this unforgettable journey.

packages.title: Adi Kailash & Om Parvat VIP Helicopter Luxury Package
packages.overview: Skip long mountain roads. Arrive on elite chopper transfers directly at Gunji. This exclusive package features premium stay layouts, custom logistics clearance, and private luxury guides.
highlights: Helicopter round-trips from Pithoragarh base Directly to Gunji
Top-tier deluxe stays with continuous heating & hot water setups
Expedited administrative queue clearances
Personal high-altitude oxygen medical technician throughout
Special prayers led by main temple priests
inclusion: Round-trip helicopter flights
Luxury resorts & high-end modern military homestays
Private SUV exclusively for you and your family
Preloaded personal medical and backup kits
Special prasadam, Puja items, and guide fees

itinerary.title: Arrival in Pithoragarh and Luxury Dinner Briefing
itinerary.details: Arrive at Pithoragarh. Private luxury transfer to the estate hotel. Evening orientation session and personal physician checks.

itinerary.title: VIP Helicopter Flight to Gunji Heli-base
itinerary.details: Fly high over snowy ridges. Land at Gunji within 30 minutes. Settle into the luxury warm cottage camp.

itinerary.title: Exclusive Om Parvat Darshan & Puja
itinerary.details: Drive with dedicated security escort to the Om Parvat viewpoint. Sacred Havan ceremonies overlooking the peak.

itinerary.title: Helicopter back to Pithoragarh & Dunagiri Hermitage
itinerary.details: Direct morning heli-hop to Pithoragarh, transfer via private Innova Crysta to Ranikhet estate resort.

itinerary.title: Ranikhet to Kathgodam Farewell
itinerary.details: Enjoy luxurious breakfast, and travel smoothly to Kathgodam with direct boarding assists.

packages.title: Mount Kailash Aerial Darshan by Flight (No Visa Needed)
packages.overview: Observe the mighty Mount Kailash and Holy Mansarovar Lake from close quarters from a customized pressurized mountain flight. Fully avoids the strict China Visa, biometric rules, and hard high-altitude trekking.
highlights: Cruising at 21,000 ft in chartered aircraft for close-up aerial darsan
Witness Mount Kailash, Mansarovar Lake, and Mount Gurla Mandhata
Completely hassle-free: No chin-visa, passport physical stamps or age constraints
Includes premium 5-Star stay in Lucknow and Nepalgunj
Accompanied by Vedic scholars chanting stotras during the flight
inclusion: IndiGo/Charter flight tickets exclusively mapped to window views
3 Nights 5-Star accommodations
All land premium transfers in AC coaches
Vedic scholars, customized group puja, and yatra kits
Complete travel insurance and airport porterage
exclusion: Any personal extra flights from home-city to Lucknow
Personal expenses such as laundry or souvenir buying

itinerary.title: Arrival in Lucknow - Luxurious Welcome Setup
itinerary.details: Warm traditional tikka welcome at Lucknow 5-star hotel. Evening Ganga Aarti style session and spiritual briefing.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Nepalgunj Border Town - Sacred Sankalpa Puja
itinerary.details: Deluxe road transit to Nepalgunj. Group gathers for the sacred Kailash Sankalpa Puja led by spiritual teachers.

itinerary.title: The Holy Charter Flight - Darshan of Mt Kailash & Lake
itinerary.details: Board the specialized flight. Within 40 minutes, behold the majestic south and west faces of Mount Kailash and the dazzling blue waters of Mansarovar. Chanting and interactive meditations in the skies.

itinerary.title: Return to Lucknow and Departure
itinerary.details: Morning feedback sharing, transfer back to Lucknow airport/station with divine Prasadam distribution.

packages.title: Kailash Mansarovar Overland Tour via Lhasa Direct
packages.overview: The ultimate overland pilgrimage traversing the ancient cities of Lhasa, Shigatse, Saga to the base of Holy Mt Kailash. Includes 3 days of rigorous Parikrama (Kora) around Mt. Kailash.
highlights: 3-Day continuous Parikrama of Mount Kailash (Kora)
Explore Potala Palace & Jokhang Temple in the sacred city of Lhasa
Perform holy rituals on the shores of Lake Mansarovar
Top-tier high-altitude oxygen backup trucks accompanying the group
Experienced Nepali Sherpas & Tibetan guides managing all stops
inclusion: Tibet Group Visa and special military route permits
Lhasa inbound flight tickets
Stay in deluxe hotels and basic high-altitude mud-cottage guest-houses
All meals cooked by our specialized kitchen group accompanying the caravan
Full oxygen cylinders, hyperbaric chambers, and medical team support
exclusion: Horse / Porter charges during the 3-day trek

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Arrival & Documentation setup
itinerary.details: Arrive in Kathmandu, rest at the hotel, submit passports for Tibet Group Visa.

itinerary.title: Sacred Kathmandu Temples Tour
itinerary.details: Visit Pashupatinath Temple and Budhanilkantha (Sleeping Vishnu).

itinerary.title: Scenic Flight to Lhasa (3650m)
itinerary.details: Fly over Everest region into Lhasa. Quiet rest day for vital altitude acclimatization.

itinerary.title: Explore Lhasa: Potala Palace & Barkhor Street
itinerary.details: Full guided tour of historical palaces, spiritual monasteries, and markets.

itinerary.title: Drive to Shigatse via Lake Yamdrok
itinerary.details: Witness the brilliant turquoise waters of Lake Yamdrok.

itinerary.title: Shigatse to Saga - Himalayan Highway
itinerary.details: Drive alongside the Yarlung Tsangpo (Brahmaputra) River.

itinerary.title: Saga to Lake Mansarovar - Epic First Darshan
itinerary.details: Reach the holy waters of Lake Mansarovar (15,000 ft). Perform sacred bath and evening prayers.

itinerary.title: Sufferance Pooja at Mansarovar and Drive to Darchen
itinerary.details: Sankalpa Havan at Mansarovar shore under the giant shadow of Mt. Kailash. Short drive to Darchen base camp.

itinerary.title: Kailash Parikrama - Day 1: Darchen to Dirapuk
itinerary.details: Begin the holy trek (12 km). Walk past Yama Dwar to stand directly in front of the golden North Face of Mount Kailash.

itinerary.title: Kailash Parikrama - Day 2: Dirapuk to Dolma La Pass to Zuthulpuk
itinerary.details: The toughest day (22 km). Ascend to the highest point Dolma La Pass (18,600 ft). Touch the holy Gauri Kund ice structures, descend to Zuthulpuk.

itinerary.title: Kailash Parikrama - Day 3: Zuthulpuk to Saga
itinerary.details: Complete the Kora (8 km), board SUVs, and head back to Saga.

itinerary.title: Saga to Shigatse Journey Back
itinerary.details: Comfort-focused return drive discussing stories and yatra learnings.

itinerary.title: Shigatse to Lhasa Airport and Kathmandu
itinerary.details: Flight returns to Kathmandu for celebration dinner.

itinerary.title: Final Departures from Kathmandu
itinerary.details: Airport drop for homeward journey with soul-stirring memories.

packages.title: Classic Uttarakhand Chardham Yatra (All Inclusive)
packages.overview: Visit the legendary four abodes of gods: Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath. Standard premium rooms, dedicated tour coordinators, and pure veg meals.
highlights: Drive to holy rivers originations at Yamunotri and Gangotri
16km divine trek to high Kedarnath shrine inside beautiful valleys
Special fast-track entry passes for Badrinath temple prayers
Stay in comfortable riverside hotels
Travel inside AC Force Travelers with veteran mountain drivers
inclusion: AC transport from Rishikesh to Rishikesh
Pre-booked neat accommodations with hot water
Morning tea, breakfast, and dinner included
Biometric enrollment and online registration processing
Support guides and physical assistance details
exclusion: Pony or pithu (basket carrier) hiring costs

itinerary.title: Rishikesh to Barkot (Yamunotri base)
itinerary.details: Drive through Mussoorie, Kempty Falls to arrive at scenic Barkot.

itinerary.title: Trek to Yamunotri Temple & Return
itinerary.details: 6km walk to the temple of Goddess Yamuna. Cook rice in Surya Kund warm streams.

itinerary.title: Barkot to Uttarkashi (Ganges zone)
itinerary.details: Drive via Chamba to Uttarkashi. Visit Kashi Vishwanath temple.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Gangotri Temple
itinerary.details: Scenic drive through Harsil valley. Perform rituals on the banks of Bhagirathi (Ganga).

itinerary.title: Uttarkashi to Guptkashi / Phata
itinerary.details: Long mountain drive along Mandakini River to Kedarnath base town.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath Temple Ascent
itinerary.details: Hike or fly up to Lord Shiva's high altitude shrine. Attend soul-stirring evening prayer.

itinerary.title: Descend to Base and rest at Pipalkoti
itinerary.details: Walk down from Kedarnath. Drive to beautiful quiet hotel in Pipalkoti.

itinerary.title: Pipalkoti to Badrinath Shrine
itinerary.details: Reach Badrinath. Dip in Tapt Kund warm pool and attend evening Darshan.

itinerary.title: Mana Village tour & Drive to Srinagar Garhwal
itinerary.details: Explore 'First Indian Village' Mana, then descend back to Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Rishikesh via Devprayag
itinerary.details: See the divine confluence of Alaknanda and Bhagirathi rivers at Devprayag. Arrive in Rishikesh.

itinerary.title: Departures from Rishikesh
itinerary.details: Final departures after peaceful morning Ganga bath.

packages.title: Amarnath Yatra Premium Helicopter Package (via Baltal)
packages.overview: Sip serene Kashmir valleys. Fly to Panchtarni via helicopter to complete your holy cave darsan of the self-formed Ice Lingam with maximum speed and ease.
highlights: Guaranteed priority helicopter tickets from Baltal/Neelgrath to Panchtarni
Short 6km trek/walk from Panchtarni to the Holy cave
Acclimatize in deluxe lakeside Houseboats in Srinagar
Comprehensive medical forms assistance
Srinagar local Mughul gardens tour included
inclusion: Helicopter flight ticket (Neelgrath-Panchtarni-Neelgrath)
Premium houseboat and neat swiss-luxury camps at Baltal
All meals (pure veg bhandara styled / buffet)
Sedan airport pickup and drop transfers
Yantra insurance coverage parameters
exclusion: Horse / Palki charges from Panchtarni helipad to cave (can be hired locally)
Extraneous emergency delays due to weather halts

itinerary.title: Srinagar Airport Pickup & Premium Houseboat stay
itinerary.details: Step onto Shikara boat transfers. Relax in carved wooden houseboats. Enjoy warm saffron Kahwa tea.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Baltal camp via Sonmarg Valley
itinerary.details: Immerse in Sonmarg 'Meadow of Gold'. Settle in customized weather-proof alpine base camps at Baltal.

itinerary.title: The Holy Flight and Cave Darshan
itinerary.details: Fly up to Panchtarni. Perform the short trek to the Holy Cave. Pray before the grand Ice Stalagmite of Lord Shiva. Fly back to Baltal / Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Standard Departure with Dal Lake Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Check out after breakfast. Wrap up with souvenirs, and transfer directly to Srinagar Airport.

packages.title: Divine Om Parvat & Nabhidhang Spiritual Darshan
packages.overview: A dedicated journey focused on witnessing the eternal, self-formed Om symbol on the peak of Om Parvat. Includes stays in spiritual villages and meditations with local sages.
highlights: Detailed morning Darshan at Nabhidhang viewpoint
Guided group chanting of the Shiva Mahimna Stotra
Acclimatize in the scenic border village of Nabi
inclusion: All special border clearances & registration fees (Reg ID: NT-2026)
Warm homestays with direct view of snowy peaks
4x4 rugged border transit (Bolero)
Continuous oxygen cylinder equipment support
exclusion: Personal pony rides or high terrain porters

itinerary.title: Assembling at Dharchula and medical clearing
itinerary.details: We compile your biometric records and carry out brief clinical checkups.

itinerary.title: 4x4 Climb to Gunji via roaring Kali river
itinerary.details: We pass marvelous Chirkilla Dam cascades and military posts.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Nabhidhang for Om Parvat Darshan
itinerary.details: Early morning drive to the spiritual frontier to stand in prayer before Om Parvat.

itinerary.title: Acclimatized local walking in Vyas Valley
itinerary.details: Listen to the folklore of Sage Ved Vyas and return to Dharchula.

packages.title: Munsyari, Khalia Top & Birthi Falls Retreat
packages.overview: Uncover the pristine town of Munsyari, standing at 2200m elevation. Marvel at the dramatic, close-up panoramic sight of the five Panchachuli peaks.
highlights: Adventurous trek to the snowy Khalia Top ridge
Spectacular view of the 400ft high Birthi Waterfalls
Traditional Kumaoni heritage culinary workshop
inclusion: AC SUV transport for all sightseeing routes
Pre-booked deluxe rooms in premium wooden chalets
Local nature expert guide
Special permission clearances for reserve walks

itinerary.title: Kathgodam to Almora to Munsyari scenic drive
itinerary.details: Drive through the spiritual heart of Kumaon.

itinerary.title: Exploration of Birthi falls and local handloom mastershops
itinerary.details: See the majestic high water torrent and tribal rugs.

itinerary.title: Hike to the mighty Khalia Top viewpoint
itinerary.details: Walk through rhododendron forests to reach the summit for 360 degree peak vistas.

itinerary.title: Visit Nanda Devi temple and Return Transit
itinerary.details: Traditional prayers and checkouts towards Kathgodam.

packages.title: Neem Karoli Baba Ashram & Lake District Spiritual Tour
packages.overview: Meditate inside the quiet valley of Kainchi Dham, established by the world-famous mystic Neem Karoli Baba. Includes tranquil lakes of Nainital, Bhimtal, and Sattal.
highlights: Full day spent inside Kainchi Dham ashram praying
Special morning meditation and Hanuman Chalisa chanting
Shikara boat ride on the sacred Naini Lake
inclusion: Neat luxury hotel stays
Traditional organic satvik breakfast & dinner meals
AC private cab with dedicated driver-companion
exclusion: Personal temple donation or Pooja materials

itinerary.title: Kathgodam arrival and drive to Nainital hotel
itinerary.details: Check-in, evening lake walk, and sunset viewing.

itinerary.title: Full day excursion to holy Kainchi Dham Ashram
itinerary.details: Spend the day meditating, attending prasad distributions, and soaking in the divine energy.

itinerary.title: Nainital Lake temple circuits and spiritual walks
itinerary.details: Visit Naina Devi shrine and Hanumangarhi temple.

itinerary.title: Departure back to Kathgodam railway link
itinerary.details: Finish with heartwarming memories of Neem Karoli Baba.

packages.title: Sacred Maa Purnagiri Shaktipith Darshan Yatra
packages.overview: Perform divine prayers at one of the 108 revered Shaktipeeths of Goddess Sati. Situated at 3000 ft on the green hills of Tanakpur overlooking the roaring Sharda River.
highlights: Holy trek to the mountain top temple of Maa Purnagiri
Attend the majestic evening Sharda River Maha Aarti
Explore the ancient Siddha Narsingh Temple
inclusion: Private taxi transfers throughout the trip
Dharamsala or premium guestrooms close to the temple path
Continuous guide support during the trek

itinerary.title: Tanakpur arrival and transfer to Purnagiri baseline
itinerary.details: Evening orientation briefing and attend Sharda River Aarti.

itinerary.title: Morning sacred trek to Maa Purnagiri temple top
itinerary.details: Climb the steps to the high hill shrine, perform Pujas, and receive holy thread blessings.

itinerary.title: Koteshwar Mahadev and Tanakpur departure
itinerary.details: Depart Tanakpur with the divine protection of Goddess Purnagiri.

packages.title: Panchachuli Base Camp Trek & Darma River Safari
packages.overview: A spectacular expedition taking you near the base of the five magnificent high snow peaks of the Panchachuli Range, rising over 6000 meters into local skies.
highlights: Camp under the grand shadows of Panchachuli Peaks
Walk through historic Tibetan-Darma border trading routes
Immerse in local Rang folk dance and bonfire music at night
inclusion: Alpine dome tents, sleeping bags, and mattress kits
Highly trained certified mountain trek managers & cooks
Inner Line Forest department permissions
Hot organic high calorie nutritional meals

itinerary.title: Assembling at Sobla village and base preparations
itinerary.details: Gear verification, safety checklist validation, and medical briefings.

itinerary.title: Trek through wild bamboo and pine woods to Urthing
itinerary.details: Scenic 12 km walk alongside the gorgeous, gushing Darma river.

itinerary.title: Urthing to Nagling via high rocky trails
itinerary.details: Acclimatize in this incredibly silent high elevation settlement.

itinerary.title: Summit day: Reach Panchachuli Base camp & viewpoint
itinerary.details: Stand in complete awe of the five giant snow-capped pillars towering above you.

packages.title: Darma Valley Glacial Trails Exploration Yatra
packages.overview: Venture deep inside the Darma Valley, a hidden Himalayan gem situated close to the Indo-Tibetan border. Home to ancient glaciers, beautiful wildflowers, and pure local cultures.
highlights: Travel through the rugged, beautiful gorges of River Darma
Stay in historical wooden homestays in Tidang & Sela
Witness majestic hanging glaciers and high altitude waterfalls
inclusion: 4x4 SUV special mountain Boleros
Warm traditional homestays operated by native families
All border defense permits
Pure satvik organic local food

itinerary.title: Dharchula arrival & document clearing
itinerary.details: Secure military clearances and prepare high terrain vehicles.

itinerary.title: Drive from Dharchula to Sela village
itinerary.details: Enter Darma valley and sleep in traditional mud-stone cottages.

itinerary.title: Sela to Tidang village exploration
itinerary.details: Breathtaking route of rocky slides, dense pine forests, and border bridges.

itinerary.title: Glacial views at Marchha & Return Journey
itinerary.details: Walk near high mountain glaciers before descending to baseline.

packages.title: Chirkilla Dam & Kali River Eco Tourism Valley Ride
packages.overview: See the spectacular engineering marvel of the Chirkilla Dam on the roaring Kali River. Surrounded by lush, green valleys and majestic cliffs.
highlights: Slight boat cruise on the tranquil high-altitude reservoir
Walk down into the lush tea gardens nearby Pithoragarh
See beautiful mountain birds and photography hotspots
inclusion: AC private sedan transport
Prefree pre-booked tidy hotels with views
Entrance passes and boat tickets included
Guided tour of the power station borders

itinerary.title: Drive through scenic steps to Dharchula baseline
itinerary.details: Assemble, register, and rest in the riverside hotel.

itinerary.title: Full day tour of Chirkilla Hydroelectric Dam
itinerary.details: Understand electricity generations, see the river control channels, and snap scenic valley memories.

itinerary.title: Visit Jauljibi confluence where Kali meets Gori river
itinerary.details: Behold the majestic, high-volume confluence of the two mighty rivers.

itinerary.title: Return journey to Pithoragarh / Haldwani
itinerary.details: Transfer back to transit points for homeward flight.

packages.title: Spiritual Meditation Retreat at Narayan Ashram
packages.overview: Unwind inside the peaceful premises of Narayan Ashram, situated at a height of 9,000 ft near Tawaghat. Established by Shri Narayan Swami in 1936 as a spiritual center.
highlights: Stay inside peaceful, meditative ashram cells
Daily yoga, Vedic chanting, and silent introspection hours
Stunning botanical gardens and spiritual text library access
inclusion: All clean, hygienic ashram stays and organic satvik meals
Guided trek around the scenic high altitude wild valleys
Private taxi from Pithoragarh and back

itinerary.title: Pithoragarh to Tawaghat and uphill climb to the Ashram
itinerary.details: Scenic travel through step farms and high oak trees.

itinerary.title: Ashram morning bell prayers and meditation
itinerary.details: Participate in early morning chanting, explore ashram historical details, and sit in silent meditation.

itinerary.title: Trek to nearby high altitude viewpoint and local villages
itinerary.details: Interact with deep mountain communities and enjoy tea sessions.

itinerary.title: Spiritual session with ashram elders and Return
itinerary.details: Closing meditation, blessings from Swamiji, and return drive.

travelStories.name: Dr. Rajesh K. Sharma
travelStories.quote: Standing before the giant natural Om on the peak at Nabhidhang was the most emotional second of my lifetime. Adi Kailash Tirath's coordination was fantastic. Stays were warm and clean despite freezing climates.

travelStories.name: Mrs. Revathi Subramanian
travelStories.quote: As elderly yatris, my husband and I had lost hope of seeing Mount Kailash due to medical trek restrictions. Adi Kailash Tirath's Aerial flight yatra let us see Shiva's Lordly peak elegantly. Har Har Mahadev!

travelStories.name: Amit & Priya Deshmukh
travelStories.quote: With helicopter blockages in Kedarnath, our guide managed immediate local pony resources and luxury homestays for us. Pure vegetarian organic food was cooked fresh every day. Absolute five stars!

travelStories.name: Shri Mahendra Pratap Singh
travelStories.quote: Being a senior citizen, I was worried about physical fatigue at high altitudes. The local guides treated me like family and helped me reach Parvati Kund with total convenience.

travelStories.name: Dr. Anjali Deshpande
travelStories.quote: Breathtakingly simple! Seeing holy Mount Kailash without Chinese visa delay or biometric stress was a spiritual boom. Strongly recommend Adi Kailash Tirath.

travelStories.name: Vikram & Shreya Patel
travelStories.quote: A perfectly organized yatra with five-star hospitality in remote valleys. Helicopter slots, VIP Darshans, and premium stays were completely top-notch.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Shri Srinivasan Iyer
yatriFeedbacks.quote: The tour organization was flawless. Going to an altitude of 14,000 feet requires great logistic care, and the team provided continuous medical oxygen backup and outstanding homestays.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Smt. Meenakshi Dhoundiyal
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Our entire family completed the holy Chardham Yatra safely. The food was 100% pure organic vegetarian, cooked fresh every day with hygienic guidelines. Incredible experience!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Ravi Teja Yadav
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Due to health constraints, standard high-altitude walking was impossible for me. The Aerial flight gave such stunningly close window viewings of Kailash & Mansarovar. Truly divine!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Shri Naresh Chandra Sen
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Every single day was blessed. The driver had incredible skills on Himalayan curves, and the spiritual satsangs organized in Dharchula warmed our souls.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Smt. Sharda Devadiga
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Pristine arrangements. From wheelchair accessibility to timely medical check-ups under local administration directions. Har Har Gange and Kedar!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Vijay & Sarita Malhotra
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Absolute comfort for seniors. Witnessing Kailash and Lake Manasarovar side-by-side on our window seat is an image burned into our minds for eternity.

blogs.title: Comprehensive Preparation Guide for Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra
blogs.excerpt: Preparing your body, lungs, and packing lists for high altitude treks over 12,000 feet. Best medical tips and permit requirements analyzed.
blogs.author: Shri Ajay Basera
blogs.content: The Adi Kailash Yatra is a dream spiritual journey for millions of Shiva devotees. However, rising to Jotling and Parvati Kund (above 12,000 ft) requires deep preparation. First, spend 30 days prior working on cardiovascular breathing exercises (Anulom Vilom and walking 5 km with weights). Second, pack layered thermal woolens as temperatures in Vyas valley drop drastically near 0°C at night. Finally, always carry a small packet of camphor tabs; inhaling its aroma helps open constricted airways under low oxygen levels.

blogs.title: Why Mount Kailash Aerial Flight Darshan has Changed Sacred Tourism
blogs.excerpt: Understand how pressurized high-flying flights now offer window viewings of Mount Kailash without China passport struggles or physical fatigue.
blogs.author: Dr. K. Dwivedi
blogs.content: For decades, spiritual pilgrims had to undergo complex Chinese consulate biometrics, visa waitlists, and extremely thin Himalayan air to catch a glimpse of the holy abode of Shiva. Adi Kailash Tirath pioneered the customized mountain aviation flights. Cruising stably at high altitudes, yatris get large-window views of Kailash, Mansarovar Lake, and Mount Gurla Mandhata. It is fully accessible to children, senior citizens, and physically challenged yatris, marking a golden era in yatra accessibility.

blogs.title: Acclimatization Hacks for High Altitude Yatris: The Golden Rules
blogs.excerpt: The vital health rules that every yatri crossing Dharchula and rising into Gunji must follow to avoid Acute Mountain Sickness (AMS).
blogs.author: Adi Kailash Tirath Medical Board Advisories
blogs.content: High Altitude sickness is completely preventable if rules are followed. Rule 1: Never ascend more than 1,000 meters in a single day once you cross 8,000 feet. That is why our itineraries feature 2 rest nights in Pithoragarh & Dharchula standard. Rule 2: Force hydrate! Drink 4-5 liters of lukewarm water daily. Rule 3: Avoid caffeine, alcohol, and heavy sleep medicines, which slow breathing rates. Listen to your guide, and check oxygen levels on oximeters twice daily.
